title: Europe’s EV market share tops 25 percent for the first time as June registrations surge nearly 40 percent
summary: The June data shows that momentum has not faded even as fuel prices have partially retreated. Germany led the volume figures with 84,057 battery-electric registrations in June, giving EVs above 28 percent of new car sales in Europe’s largest automotive market.
